creator: rssh@cam.grad.kiev.ua
text:
/etc/weekly know nothing about /etc/manpath.config, so,
       during rebuilding of whatis database, we use static manpath,
       and if we added manpath in /etc/manpath.conf, then whatis database
       don't reflect it.

How-To-Repeat: 
       Add path in /etc/manpath.conf
       (for example /usr/local/lib/perl5/man), wait a week,
       than try apropos on subject, which situated in added path.
